articles.title: Alcoa Cuts Production Guidance, Says Alumina Prices Stable Despite Iran War
articles.summary: Alcoa cut its full-year alumina guidance, citing issues at its Pinjarra, Australia refinery, and said alumina prices remained stable despite uncertainty about global shipments driven by the war in Iran.

articles.title: Alcoa Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
articles.summary: Alcoa (NYSE:AA) reported higher second-quarter revenue and adjusted earnings as stronger aluminum prices, increased shipments and value-added product premiums helped offset weakness in alumina operations, executives said on the company’s second-quarter 2026 earnings call. articles.title: Alcoa Greenlights Gallium Plant in Australia With U.S. and Japan Backing
articles.summary: Alcoa and the governments of Australia, Japan and the United States have approved the construction of a new gallium production facility at the company's Wagerup alumina refinery in Western Australia.

articles.title: Alcoa Receives International Approval for Gallium Production Project in Australia
articles.summary: Alcoa said it and the governments of Australia, Japan and the U.S. have reached a final investment decision to build a gallium production plant at the company’s Wagerup alumina refinery in Western Australia.
